You have the right to eat and drink what you want. I think right? It's a free country It's starting to feel like a communist in slave and camp where I got a check seatbelts Helmets if I don't do that. I'm breaking the law and now I can't drink 30 ounces of sugar if I want to at the movie they're literally gonna ban it from delis Movie theaters and local stores, but I could walk into a 7-eleven and get one there This doesn't make any sense. It's crazy man. Is it time to move the Statue of Liberty America the land of the free?
